name: Jessica Moore
text: Killed by Azazel, then pinned to the ceiling and set on fire. Her death mirrored Mary Winchester's.

name: John Winchester
text: Makes a demon deal with Azazel to save Dean's life.

name: Azazel
text: Shot with the Colt by Dean.

name: Sam Winchester
text: Killed by a "gifted," but revived after Dean makes a deal with the crossroads demon.

name: Ash
text: Killed in a fire at Harvelle Roadhouse.

name: Bela Talbot
text: Killed by hell-hounds.

name: Dean Winchester
text: Killed by hell-hounds.

name: Gordon Walker
text: Decapitated after turning into a vampire.

name: Lilith
text: Killed by Sam Winchester with demon-killing knife.

name: Ruby
text: Stabbed with the demon-killing knife by Dean.

name: Uriel
text: Killed by Anna.

name: Alastair
text: Killed by Sam's psychic powers.

name: Victor Hendrickson
text: Killed by Lilith's demon attack.

name: Ellen Harvelle
text: Dies in an explosion with Jo. She didn't want her daughter to die alone.

name: Jo Harvelle
text: Dies in an explosion with Ellen. She suffered from massive hemorraging due to a hell-hound attack.

name: Zachariah
text: Stabbed with an angel blade by Dean shortly after he says yes to Michael.

name: Anna Milton
text: Killed by Michael when she went back in time to kill Sam.

name: Rufus Turner
text: Killed during a hunt by a monster.

name: Raphael
text: Killed by Castiel.

name: Samuel Campbell
text: Headshot by Sam because he was possessed by a Khan worm.

name: Balthazar
text: Killed by Castiel after it is discovered he betrayed him.

name: Bobby Singer
text: He was shot by Dick Roman.

name: Dick Roman
text: Killed by Dean with the righteous bone.

name: Frank Devereaux
text: Killed offscreen by Leviathans.

name: Meg Masters
text: Stabbed with an angel blade by Crowley

name: Benny Lafeyette
text: Beheaded by Dean to return to Purgatory to save Sam.

name: Henry Winchester
text: Time travels to the future to escape Abaddon, but ends up being killed by her.

name: Samandriel
text: Killed by Castiel under Naomi's control.

name: Kevin Tran
text: Killed by Sam when he was possessed by Gadreel.

name: Abaddon
text: Stabbed with the First Blade by Dean.

name: Tessa
text: Stabbed with the First Blade by Dean.

name: Gadreel
text: Kills himself in order to get Castiel out of Heaven's Jail.

name: Bartholomew
text: Stabbed by Castiel with an angel blade.

name: Charlie Bradbury
text: Killed by the Steins in a hotel bathtub.

name: Death
text: Killed by Dean with a scythe.

name: Cain
text: Killed with the First Blade by Dean.

name: Metatron
text: Imploded by Amara after pleading for her to spare humankind.

name: Crowley
text: Killed by Lucifer in the Alternate Earth. He died protecting the Winchester brothers.

name: Dagon
text: Killed by Castiel- incinerated

name: Ramiel
text: Killed by the Winchesters with the Lance of Michael.

name: Mick Davies
text: Killed by Ketch.

name: Lady Toni Bevell
text: Killed by Ketch.

name: Alicia Barnes
text: Killed and replaced by a magical doll.

name: Castiel
text: Killed by Lucifer after returning from the Alternate Earth

name: Kaia
text: Killed by a dark figure.

name: Asmodeus
text: Killed by Gabriel.

name: Lucifer
text: Stabbed with an Archangel Blade by Dean.

name: Gabriel
text: Killed by Lucifer in Alternate World

name: Missouri Mosely
text: Killed by a Wraith.

name: Lily Sunders
text: Died after performing a spell that burned off the last of her soul (and causing her immortality magic to wear off)

name: Mary Winchester
text: Vaporized by Jack after asking him questions about what he was doing.

name: Abraxas
text: After being released from the Enochian puzzle box, he is stabbed by Nick after telling him he killed his family on orders from Lucifer.

name: Dean Winchester
text: Dies after being impaled with rebar when fighting with a nest of Vampires.

name: Sam Winchester
text: Dies from old age.

name: Castiel
text: Taken to the Empty to fulfil the deal (to be taken back when he is finally happy).

name: Billie
text: Taken to the Empty with Castiel because she sent Jack as a bomb into the Empty.

name: Michael
text: Killed by God

name: Amara
text: Absorbed- becomes one with Jack after he becomes the new God.

name: Rowena MacLeod
text: Killed executing a spell to close Hell's Gate and to absorb all of Hell's souls that escaped (to return them to their rightful place).

name: Adam Milligan
text: Destroyed after Michael is killed.

name: Maggie
text: Erased by God along with the other hunters.

name: Arthur Ketch
text: Heart ripped out by Ardat.

name: Belphagor
text: Killed by Castiel in Hell when its discovered he betrayed him and the Winchesters.

name: Duma
text: Killed with an angel blade.
